response.justification: While the candidate possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience, including high-scale microservices and polyglot programming, they completely lack the critical domain expertise required for this Principal-level role. The resume shows no background in building growth systems, experimentation platforms, feature-flagging infrastructure, or statistical data analysis, which form the core of the job description.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience including JS/TS, C/C++, and Java.
Proven track record building high-scale distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience architecting experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or A/B testing frameworks.
Lacks evidence of data analysis, statistical methods, or telemetry foundations required for growth engineering.
Scope of leadership and cross-team architectural influence may not meet enterprise Principal (IC6) expectations.
